sections.title: Exemptions - General Grounds
sections.clause_text: The provisions of Chapter II, except sub-sections (1) and (5) of section 8, and those of Chapter III and section 16 shall not apply where— (a) the processing of personal data is necessary for enforcing any legal right or claim; (b) the processing of personal data by any court or tribunal or any other body in India which is entrusted by law with the performance of any judicial or quasi-judicial or regulatory or supervisory function, where such processing is necessary for the performance of such function; (c) personal data is processed in the interest of prevention, detection, investigation or prosecution of any offence or contravention of any law for the time being in force in India; (d) personal data of Data Principals not within the territory of India is processed pursuant to any contract entered into with any person outside the territory of India by any person based in India; (e) the processing is necessary for a scheme of compromise or arrangement or merger or amalgamation...; and (f) the processing is for the purpose of ascertaining the financial information and assets and liabilities of any person who has defaulted in payment due on account of a loan or advance taken from a financial institution...

sections.title: Powers and Functions of Board

sections.title: Penalties - Determining Factors

sections.title: Penalty - Failure to Implement Security Safeguards
sections.clause_text: Breach in observing the obligation of Data Fiduciary to take reasonable security safeguards to prevent personal data breach under sub-section (5) of section 8. Penalty: May extend to two hundred and fifty crore rupees.
sections.plain_english_summary: Failure by a Data Fiduciary to implement reasonable security safeguards may attract a penalty of up to Rs. 250 crore.
sections.retrieval_text: Section Schedule subsection 1 of the Digital Personal Data Protection Act 2023 (DPDP Act). Penalty - Failure to Implement Security Safeguards Failure by a Data Fiduciary to implement reasonable security safeguards may attract a penalty of up to Rs. 250 crore. Topics: breach_reporting, penalty, security. Keywords: security safeguards, penalty, 250 crore, personal data breach, Data Fiduciary.

sections.title: Penalty - Failure to Notify Breach
sections.clause_text: Breach in observing the obligation to give the Board or affected Data Principal notice of a personal data breach under sub-section (6) of section 8. Penalty: May extend to two hundred crore rupees.
sections.plain_english_summary: Failure to notify the Board or affected Data Principals of a personal data breach may attract a penalty of up to Rs. 200 crore.
sections.retrieval_text: Section Schedule subsection 2 of the Digital Personal Data Protection Act 2023 (DPDP Act). Penalty - Failure to Notify Breach Failure to notify the Board or affected Data Principals of a personal data breach may attract a penalty of up to Rs. 200 crore. Topics: breach_reporting, penalty. Keywords: breach notification, penalty, 200 crore, Board, Data Principal.

sections.title: Penalty - Breach of Children's Data Obligations
sections.clause_text: Breach in observance of additional obligations in relation to children under section 9. Penalty: May extend to two hundred crore rupees.
sections.plain_english_summary: Breach of obligations related to processing children's personal data may attract a penalty of up to Rs. 200 crore.
sections.retrieval_text: Section Schedule subsection 3 of the Digital Personal Data Protection Act 2023 (DPDP Act). Penalty - Breach of Children's Data Obligations Breach of obligations related to processing children's personal data may attract a penalty of up to Rs. 200 crore. Topics: children_data, penalty. Keywords: children, penalty, 200 crore, children data obligations.

sections.title: Penalty - Breach of Significant Data Fiduciary Obligations
sections.clause_text: Breach in observance of additional obligations of Significant Data Fiduciary under section 10. Penalty: May extend to one hundred and fifty crore rupees.
sections.plain_english_summary: Failure to comply with additional obligations of a Significant Data Fiduciary may attract a penalty of up to Rs. 150 crore.
sections.retrieval_text: Section Schedule subsection 4 of the Digital Personal Data Protection Act 2023 (DPDP Act). Penalty - Breach of Significant Data Fiduciary Obligations Failure to comply with additional obligations of a Significant Data Fiduciary may attract a penalty of up to Rs. 150 crore. Topics: compliance, penalty. Keywords: Significant Data Fiduciary, penalty, 150 crore.

sections.title: Penalty - Breach of Data Principal Duties
sections.clause_text: Breach in observance of the duties under section 15. Penalty: May extend to ten thousand rupees.
sections.plain_english_summary: Breach of a Data Principal's duties under section 15 may attract a penalty of up to Rs. 10,000.
sections.retrieval_text: Section Schedule subsection 5 of the Digital Personal Data Protection Act 2023 (DPDP Act). Penalty - Breach of Data Principal Duties Breach of a Data Principal's duties under section 15 may attract a penalty of up to Rs. 10,000. Topics: compliance, penalty. Keywords: Data Principal duties, penalty, ten thousand rupees.

sections.title: Penalty - Breach of Voluntary Undertaking
sections.clause_text: Breach of any term of voluntary undertaking accepted by the Board under section 32. Penalty: Up to the extent applicable for the breach in respect of which the proceedings under section 28 were instituted.
sections.plain_english_summary: Breaching a voluntary undertaking accepted by the Board attracts a penalty equivalent to the maximum applicable for the underlying breach.
sections.retrieval_text: Section Schedule subsection 6 of the Digital Personal Data Protection Act 2023 (DPDP Act). Penalty - Breach of Voluntary Undertaking Breaching a voluntary undertaking accepted by the Board attracts a penalty equivalent to the maximum applicable for the underlying breach. Topics: compliance, penalty. Keywords: voluntary undertaking, breach, penalty, Board, proceedings.

sections.title: Penalty - Breach of Other Provisions
sections.clause_text: Breach of any other provision of this Act or the rules made thereunder. Penalty: May extend to fifty crore rupees.
sections.plain_english_summary: Breach of any other provision of this Act not covered by items 1–6 of the Schedule may attract a penalty of up to Rs. 50 crore.
